spending.headline: Maintain Spending Stability
spending.description: Your average monthly spending of INR 406,333 over the last three months (Jan-Mar) shows remarkable stability, just 1.4% lower than December's INR 412,000.

spending.headline: Manage Discretionary Spends
spending.description: Your average monthly discretionary spending has increased by INR 63,000 in the last three months compared to the prior three months, with Shopping and Food as key contributors.

spending.headline: Focus Travel Spends
spending.description: Your travel and accommodation spending concentrated at MakeMyTrip and Marriott Hotels, totaling INR 45,000, represented 11% of your total spending from just two transactions.

spending.headline: Manage Festival Spends
spending.description: Your recent festival spending has increased compared to your average over the last six months. This could signal a growing concentration of your outlays during festive periods.

spending.headline: Review Subscriptions
spending.description: Your 5 subscriptions, totaling INR 24,600 last year, are all flagged as redundant across streaming, music, and productivity. Review their usage.

spending.headline: Diversify Liquid Savings
spending.description: Your liquid investments total INR 690,000, with 63% concentrated in mutual funds. Diversifying can enhance your financial resilience.

spending.headline: Lower UPI Activity
spending.description: Last month, your average UPI debit ticket size was INR 2,500, down 11% from your three-month average of INR 2,800. Your UPI transaction frequency also declined by 17%.

spending.headline: Maintain Payment Discipline
spending.description: You've paid all your phone and electricity bills on time for the last three months (Dec-Feb). Your phone bills were highly consistent, averaging INR 1,018.
